cases.title: TS-04: Unauthenticated POST /check-in returns 401 Unauthenticated before domain rules run
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active session exists with valid QR token and enrolled student context for payload
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, latitude, and longitude and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response message is Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục per error-handling §4.1
Query attendance_records and check_in_attempts for the session to confirm no Present status or Success outcome
cases.expected: BR-06 blocks check-in at Layer 2 authentication before session state, token, or GPS evaluation; HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no attendance record created or updated

cases.title: TS-05: Login with returnUrl preserves check-in deep link and establishes authenticated session
preconditions: Active student account exists with valid credentials
Check-in deep link path is /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with student email, password, and returnUrl /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>
Assert HTTP status 200 and response includes redirectTo matching returnUrl
Assert Set-Cookie header sets wecheck_session HttpOnly cookie
GET /api/v1/auth/me using the issued session cookie
cases.expected: After BR-06 redirect path, login returns 200 with user profile, session object, and redirectTo /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>; session cookie issued; /auth/me returns authenticated student identity

cases.title: TS-06: Session idle beyond 8 hours rejects protected check-in with SessionExpired
preconditions: Student has AuthSession row with lastActivityAt more than 8 hours before fixed test clock
TestClock is injected and set to current time
Active session with valid QR token exists
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session cookie or bearer token and valid check-in payload
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode SessionExpired
Attempt GET /api/v1/auth/me with the same expired session
cases.expected: Expired session treated as lacking valid authenticated session per BR-06; check-in returns HTTP 401 SessionExpired with message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn; /auth/me also returns 401

cases.title: TS-03: Deactivated user login rejected with AccountDeactivated and no session issued
preconditions: Student account exists with active=false and otherwise valid credentials
No valid AuthSession exists for the user
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with deactivated student email and correct password
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode AccountDeactivated
Verify no Set-Cookie wecheck_session header is returned
POST /api/v1/check-in without session to confirm still Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Deactivated user cannot obtain valid authenticated session per BR-06; HTTP 403 AccountDeactivated; no AuthSession created; subsequent protected actions remain blocked

cases.title: Auth middleware rejects unauthenticated request before CheckInService domain pipeline executes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Auth middleware wired to identity-auth AuthSession repository
Active session with valid QR token exists in database
CheckInService instrumented or spied to detect invocation
steps: Invoke POST /check-in route handler or CheckInService entry without session credentials
Assert middleware returns 401 Unauthenticated before CheckInService.validateAndSubmit is called
Query attendance_records for the session and confirm no status change
Query check_in_attempts and confirm no Success or domain-failure outcomes logged for this request
cases.expected: BR-06 enforced at Layer 2 auth middleware; CheckInService and BR-01 through BR-12 domain rules never execute for unauthenticated callers; no side effects in attendance or check-in tables

cases.title: AuthService.requireUser rejects deactivated user stale AuthSession row in Postgres
preconditions: Student user exists with active=false in users table
Stale auth_sessions row still present for that user_id from prior activation
AuthService and AuthSession repository integrated with real DB
steps: Invoke AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) with stale session id for deactivated user
Assert requireUser fails with session-invalid semantics
Invoke auth middleware with session cookie for the stale session against protected route (e.g. GET /api/v1/auth/me)
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode AccountDeactivated per error-handling §2.2
Query attendance_records to confirm no Present record created
cases.expected: Deactivated user cannot hold valid authenticated session per BR-06 and domain model §4.1; middleware returns 401 AccountDeactivated before protected handler; no attendance mutations

cases.title: AuthSession transitions from valid to unusable after 8-hour inactivity threshold
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with last_activity_at at T0
TestClock fixture controls current time
AuthService.requireUser available for session validation
steps: Verify AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) succeeds at T0 + 7h 59m
Advance clock to T0 + 8h 1m without updating last_activity_at
Call AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) again
Attempt protected API call with the session at advanced clock time
cases.expected: beforeState: session valid for protected actions; afterState: session expired and BR-06 blocks protected operations with 401 SessionExpired semantics

cases.title: POST /check-in without credentials returns 401 Unauthenticated error envelope
preconditions: API server is running
Valid check-in request body prepared per API design §6.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in without Cookie and without Authorization header
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response JSON contains errorCode Unauthenticated, message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục, and requestId
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard error envelope per validation rules §4 BR-06 mapping; outcome Unauthenticated when check-in response uses outcome field

cases.title: GET /auth/me without session returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or bearer token present
API server is running
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me without authentication headers
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with errorCode Unauthenticated; no user profile returned; protected self-service route blocked per BR-06

cases.title: POST /sessions without authentication returns 401 before session creation
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Valid session create payload with classId, subjectId, room GPS, and schedule
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions with valid JSON body and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query sessions table and confirm no new row created for the payload
cases.expected: Instructor protected action blocked at authentication layer per BR-06 scope; HTTP 401; no session record persisted

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET /reports/summary returns 401 before report authorization runs
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Closed sessions with attendance data exist in database
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-2026-PILOT&subjectCode=HESD-WSD&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 without auth
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: BR-06 denies unauthenticated access before BR-08 report scope check; HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no report data returned

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST /reports/export returns 401 before admin role guard
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header
Attendance data exists for export filter parameters
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query export_audit_logs and confirm no new export audit row
cases.expected: CSV export endpoint requires authentication per BR-06 before BR-09 admin-only guard; HTTP 401; no export file or audit log created

cases.title: POST /auth/logout then reuse revoked session cookie returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: Authenticated student session established via POST /auth/login
Session cookie value captured before logout
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/logout with valid session cookie
Assert HTTP status 204 No Content
POST /api/v1/check-in with previously captured session cookie and valid payload
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Revoked session no longer satisfies BR-06 valid authenticated session requirement; check-in blocked with 401 Unauthenticated

cases.title: Malformed or unknown session cookie returns 401 Unauthenticated on protected route
preconditions: No valid session exists for the test client
API server is running
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Cookie wecheck_session=not-a-valid-uuid
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
GET /api/v1/auth/me with Authorization Bearer invalid-token-value
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Invalid session identifiers fail BR-06 authentication check; HTTP 401 for both cookie and bearer variants; no user data leaked

cases.title: Invalid login credentials leave caller unauthenticated for subsequent check-in
preconditions: Student account exists with known email
No valid session is established
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with correct email and wrong password
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode InvalidCredentials
Verify no Set-Cookie wecheck_session header is returned
POST /api/v1/check-in without session and assert HTTP 401 Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Failed login does not establish session; BR-06 continues to block check-in with 401 Unauthenticated

cases.title: Unauthenticated check-in deep link redirects to login preserving returnUrl
preconditions: User is not logged in (no wecheck_session cookie)
Mobile browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id> from scanned QR deep link
steps: Open /check-in?token=<token-id> in mobile viewport
Observe browser URL changes to /login with returnUrl query parameter encoding the check-in path
Verify check-in page content is not shown and no success confirmation appears
cases.expected: Browser enforces BR-06 auth gate: redirects to /login?returnUrl=%2Fcheck-in%3Ftoken%3D<token-id>; no attendance action occurs; login form displayed

cases.title: Successful login after redirect returns student to check-in flow with session established
preconditions: Student landed on login page with returnUrl pointing to /check-in?token=<token-id>
Student has valid active account credentials
steps: Enter valid email and password on LoginForm
Submit login
Observe post-login navigation URL and page content
Verify authenticated shell or check-in UI loads with token context preserved
Verify client may invoke GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with session cookie (BR-15 runs only after BR-06 auth gate satisfied)
cases.expected: After BR-06 login redirect, browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id>; session established; check-in flow UI renders and authenticated preflight may proceed per user flows §1 and BR-15

cases.title: Expired session on check-in page shows toast and redirects to login with returnUrl
preconditions: Student session cookie exists but server treats session as expired (lastActivityAt > 8h ago via TestClock)
Student is on /check-in page attempting submission
steps: Trigger check-in submit action on expired session
Observe toast or alert with message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in path
cases.expected: UI handles BR-06 session expiry: session-expired toast displayed; user redirected to login with returnUrl; check-in does not complete until re-authentication

cases.title: Protected instructor route redirects unauthenticated user to login
preconditions: User is not logged in
Instructor session list route exists at /instructor/sessions or equivalent protected path
steps: Navigate directly to instructor sessions list URL without authentication
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl encoding the instructor path
Verify session management UI content is not rendered
cases.expected: BR-06 applies to all protected instructor actions in SPA; unauthenticated navigation blocked with login redirect and returnUrl preserved

cases.title: Flow A authentication gate: unauthenticated student cannot check in until login completes
preconditions: Instructor has opened Active session with valid QR token per Flow A steps 1–3
Student is unauthenticated when opening check-in deep link from QR
steps: Student opens check-in deep link from QR payload and is redirected to login
Complete login with valid student credentials and returnUrl preserved
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with authenticated student session and assert HTTP 200
POST /api/v1/check-in with authenticated session and valid coordinates
Verify instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/attendance shows Present count incremented
cases.expected: BR-06 enforced as first gate in Flow A workshop path (validation-rules §5.1 step 2 before BR-15 preflight and submit); check-in succeeds only after valid authenticated session established; identity binding prerequisite for anti-proxy controls

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET check-in preflight returns 401 before BR-15 enrollment evaluation
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active session with Valid qr_tokens row exists
tokenId known from valid QR payload
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight without Cookie and without Authorization header
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response message is Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục per error-handling §2.2
Verify response body contains no session summary fields (class, subject, room) indicating BR-15 domain chain did not run
cases.expected: BR-06 blocks preflight at Layer 2 authentication per BR-15 scope; HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; enrollment and token validity checks never execute for unauthenticated callers
